qa_pairs.question: How can users access the Nibi cluster through a web browser?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access the Nibi cluster via Open OnDemand (OOD), a web-based platform. To log in, one should navigate to `https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca/`, sign in with multi-factor authentication (MFA), and then they will be presented with options to open a Bash shell terminal or launch a remote desktop session.

qa_pairs.question: Is it possible to use JupyterLab on the Nibi cluster, and how is it accessed?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, users can run JupyterLab interactively on the Nibi cluster. This is done through the Nibi Open OnDemand portal, which is accessible at `https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca/`.
